title: Insurance
doc_html:
§210.7. Insurance

            A business entity that operates a personal delivery device under this Subpart shall maintain an insurance policy that includes general liability coverage of not less than one hundred thousand dollars, for damages arising from the operation of the personal delivery device.

            Acts 2021, No. 214, §1, eff. June 11, 2021.
doc_text:
§210.7.  Insurance
A business entity that operates a personal delivery device under this Subpart shall
maintain an insurance policy that includes general liability coverage of not less than one
hundred thousand dollars, for damages arising from the operation of the personal delivery
device.
Acts 2021, No. 214, §1, eff. June 11, 2021.
